name: cc
description: Session mesh for Claude Code. Email-cc semantics: every session stays informed of what its siblings are doing, with file-overlap alerts that prevent two agents silently clobbering the same file. Includes the time subsystem (rule, hook, /time-* skills).

args: ARCH=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/x64/'); OS=$(uname -s | tr A-Z a-z); BIN="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/cc-server-${OS}-${ARCH}"; if [ -x "$BIN" ]; then exec "$BIN"; fi; if [ ! -d "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/node_modules" ]; then ln -sfn "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/node_modules" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/node_modules" 2>/dev/null || (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && bun install --silent); fi; exec bun "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server.ts"
